title: Hello Neighbor Cars!
description: This is a mod that adds the cars from Hello Neighbor as blocks!
body:
This is a mod that adds the cars from the alphas of Hello Neighbor (Pre-Alpha-Beta 1)

 

You can't drive the cars though, they're just static blocks.

 

I'd recommend using this mod with [Ravenbrooks Craft](https://modrinth.com/mod/ravenbrooks.c-hello-neighbor) by [Richard_Burusa](https://modrinth.com/user/Richard_Burusa)!

**Special thanks to [Richard_Burusa](https://modrinth.com/user/Richard_Burusa) for letting me use some of his assets for this!**

To-Do List:

-     Add the cars from the full game + HN2
-     Fix the bounding boxes/collision
